Price.description: The cost of the pricing option when sold at a physical location.

OnlinePrice.description: The cost of the pricing option when sold online.

TaxIncluded.description: The amount of tax included in the price, if inclusive pricing is enabled.

ProgramId.description: The ID of the program that this pricing option applies to.

TaxRate.description: The tax rate applied to the pricing option. This field is populated only when you include a `LocationID` in the request.

ProductId.description: The unique ID of this pricing option. This is the `PurchasedItems[].Id` returned from GET Sales.

Id.description: The barcode ID of the pricing option. This is the `PurchasedItems[].BarcodeId` returned from GET Sales.

Name.description: The name of the pricing option.

Count.description: The initial count of usages available for the pricing option.

SellOnline.description: When true, filters to the pricing options that can be sold online. Default: *false*

SaleInContractOnly.description: When `true`, indicates that the pricing option is allowed to be purchased in a contract or package. When `false`, indicates that the pricing option is not allowed to be purchased in a contract or package.

Type.description: The type of the pricing option, either Drop-in, Series, or Unlimited.

ExpirationType.description: The date the pricing option begins its activation, either the date of sale or the date the client first used it for a visit.

ExpirationUnit.description: The unit, either days or months, of `ExpirationLength`, indicating how long the pricing option is active for.

ExpirationLength.description: The number of days or months that the pricing option is active for.

RevenueCategory.description: The revenue category of the pricing option.

MembershipId.description: The ID that this pricing option grants membership to.

SellAtLocationIds.description: The location IDs where this pricing option is sold.

UseAtLocationIds.description: The location IDs where this pricing option may be used.

Priority.description: The priority of the pricing option, either High, Medium, or Low.

IsIntroOffer.description: Indicates if this pricing option is an introductory offer.

IntroOfferType.description: When `IsIntroOffer` is true, this indicates if this introductory offer may be purchased by new clients or new and existing clients.

IsThirdPartyDiscountPricing.description: Indicates whether this pricing option is sold at discounted rates by third-party services, such as ClassPass.

Program.description: The name of the service category the pricing option belongs to.

Discontinued.description: If the pricing option has been marked discontinued.

RestrictToMembershipIds.description: Restricted to members of these membership ids.

ApplyMemberDiscountsOfMembershipIds.description: Discounts applied of these membership ids.
